definition:
exclamation of pain, fright, pity, anger, grief, also of surprise, properly οἴ μοι ah me! woe's me!  (Theognis Elegiacus);—;with genitive causae, οἴμοι τῶν κακῶν, οἴμοι γέλωτος ah me  for my misfortunes, for the laughter, [variant datesTragica Adespota 
The last syllable in οἴμοι may be elided before ὡς. (ML)
